creator: var@schellong.biz
text:
(In reply to Piotr Kubaj from comment #4)

After all I need a new platform.
My currently platform is from 2006, without UEFI and GPT-volume.
At time I cannot move or install anything.
For example I cannot overwrite FBSD 11.2 with 12.1, because
there is no seamonkey package in 12.1 (I have had installed).
Thereafter I overwrote 12.1 with the old 11.2.

I have to solve this and similar problems on a new HEDT platform.
Then with a functional new VMware and so on ...
